S.FORM: Muhammadu Buhari I 1942 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Muhammadu Buhari, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nigeria anini i ci Muhammadu Buhari, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mo~u~uńßamma…¨~…ģo~u~u b~b~vo~u~uńßari i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mo~u~uńßamma…¨~…ģo~u~u b~b~vo~u~uńßari, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ni*…ôria anini i ¶i mo~u~uńßamma…¨~…ģo~u~u b~b~vo~u~uńßari, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Muhammadu Buhari I 1942 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Muhammadu Buhari, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nigeria anini i ci Muhammadu Buhari, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mo~u~uńßamma…¨~…ģo~u~u b~b~vo~u~uńßari i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mo~u~uńßamma…¨~…ģo~u~u b~b~vo~u~uńßari, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ni*…ôria anini i ¶i mo~u~uńßamma…¨~…ģo~u~u b~b~vo~u~uńßari, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
